chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my browser tabs.
chunks.ja: 今日は私のブラウザのタブについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually keep about fifteen tabs open.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい15個くらいのタブを開いています。

chunks.en: I keep my email open all day long.
chunks.ja: 私はメールを一日中ずっと開いています。

chunks.en: I also keep our team chat open all day.
chunks.ja: チームのチャットも一日中開いています。

chunks.en: I close old tabs at the end of the day.
chunks.ja: 私は一日の終わりに古いタブを閉じます。

chunks.en: I find the tab I want by its small icon.
chunks.ja: 私は小さなアイコンで目的のタブを見つけます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I use the search box to find a tab.
chunks.ja: ときどき検索ボックスを使ってタブを探します。

chunks.en: So that's how I use my browser tabs every day.
chunks.ja: というわけで、それが私の毎日のタブの使い方です。

outline: Opening: talk about my browser tabs
Point 1: how many tabs and which sites stay open
Point 2: when I close tabs and how I find them

modelTalk.text: I want to tell you about my browser tabs. I always keep a lot of tabs open. Sometimes I have twenty tabs. It's too many, but I can't help it. I keep some sites open all day. My email is always there. My music and my chat are open too. I don't close them. I close old tabs at night. Sometimes I close them on Friday. It feels good to clean up. But finding the right tab is hard. The tabs get very small. So I use the search box. I just type a word. Then I find my tab fast. That's how I do it.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my browser tabs.
chunks.ja: 今日はブラウザのタブについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually keep about fifteen tabs open at once.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい一度に15個くらいのタブを開いています。

chunks.en: I keep my email and chat open all day.
chunks.ja: 私はメールとチャットを一日中開いています。

chunks.en: I also keep the ticket board open every day.
chunks.ja: 私は毎日チケットのボードも開いています。

chunks.en: I close old tabs at the end of the day.
chunks.ja: 私は一日の終わりに古いタブを閉じます。

chunks.en: To find the tab I want, I use search.
chunks.ja: 目的のタブを見つけるために、私は検索を使います。

chunks.en: So that's how I manage my browser tabs.
chunks.ja: そんなふうに私はブラウザのタブを管理しています。

outline: Opening: talk about my browser tabs
How many tabs and which sites stay open
When I close old tabs and how I find one
Wrap-up: how I manage my tabs

modelTalk.text: I usually keep lots of tabs open. Maybe ten or twelve. It's a bad habit, but I can't stop. I keep some sites open all day. My email is always there. My music page stays open too. I like to check the news, so that tab stays open. I don't close old tabs often. Sometimes there are too many. Then I close some at night. It feels good to clean them up. Finding the right tab can be hard. The tabs get very small. So I use search to find one. I just type a word, and it shows up. That's how I stay a little organized.
